summary: Completed comprehensive testing of professional admin credit/debit feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. Customers can now see professional transaction displays (SEPA Transfer, Wire Transfer, etc.) with sender details, IBAN, reference, and description - just like a real bank.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin Professional Credit API - Successfully credited €250 with professional metadata (SEPA Transfer, Deutsche Bank AG, IBAN, BIC, reference, description)
Backend: Admin Professional Debit API - Successfully debited €50 with professional metadata (Withdrawal, Amazon EU, IBAN, reference, description)
Backend: Customer View Professional Transactions API - Customer can retrieve transactions with professional metadata
Frontend: Admin Professional Credit Form - All fields present and functional (amount, display_type, sender_name, sender_iban, sender_bic, reference, description, admin_note)
Frontend: Admin Professional Debit Form - All fields present and functional (amount, display_type, recipient_name, recipient_iban, reference, description, admin_note)
Frontend: Customer Dashboard Professional Display - Transactions show display_type (SEPA Transfer, Withdrawal), sender_name (From: Test Bank AG), reference (Ref: TEST-REF-001), description
Frontend: Amount Direction Display - Amounts correctly show +/- with green (credit) and red (debit) colors
Frontend: Previous Features - Login, P2P transfers, spending insights all working correctly
Backend: All 31 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend: Admin can navigate to user details and access ledger operations
Frontend: Success toast messages displayed after credit/debit operations
Frontend: Balance updates correctly after transactions
